evidenceSnippetOriginal: M365 Copilot (Premium) is an AI-powered productivity tool that seamlessly integrates with various Microsoft 365 apps (Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Outlook, Teams, and more)... Available to: All Staff, Project Accounts and Departmental Accounts. Service Charge and Application: Charged; application required.
